flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of California-Berkeley rose 19% between 2007 and 2010 ($11.0k → $13.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of California-Berkeley rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.2k → $16.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of California-Berkeley rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.0k → $50.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of California-Berkeley fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
